allow: PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "C:\\Users\\cajgo\\Documents\\Mater_Dolorosa\\static", "C:\\Users\\cajgo\\Documents\\Mater_Dolorosa\\media", "C:\\Users\\cajgo\\Documents\\Mater_Dolorosa\\templates" | Out-Null; foreach \($d in 'static','media','templates'\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Force "C:\\Users\\cajgo\\Documents\\Mater_Dolorosa\\$d\\.gitkeep" | Out-Null }; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\cajgo\\Documents\\Mater_Dolorosa"; & ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" manage.py check)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3306,3307,3308,3309,3310 } | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "$\($_.LocalAddress\):$\($_.LocalPort\) -> $\($p.ProcessName\) \(PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)\)" })

PowerShell($out = "C:\\Users\\cajgo\\Documents\\Mater_Dolorosa\\static\\js"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $out | Out-Null; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.5.1/dist/chart.umd.min.js" -OutFile "$out\\chart.umd.min.js" -UseBasicParsing } catch { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.9/dist/chart.umd.min.js" -OutFile "$out\\chart.umd.min.js" -UseBasicParsing }; \(Get-Item "$out\\chart.umd.min.js"\).Length)
